## Summary

Describe the change and the user-visible problem it solves.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Build or packaging

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run test`.
- [ ] I updated documentation where relevant.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where the behavior changed.

## Notes for reviewers

Mention affected databases, permissions, screenshots, or follow-up work here.
